name: Kawaii Fruits 3D
author: Poki
description: Kawaii Fruits 3D is a watermelon game in the very popular Suika genre. It's a merge puzzle game where you can merge different balls dropping unexpectedly! The game features various themes for the balls, ranging from cute fruits to ornament balls. Release those balls strategically so they can merge into bigger ones. Reach the goal to advance to the next level. The game saves your levels and progress, so you can always pick up where you left off. How many levels can you conquer? How to play Kawaii Fruits 3D? Move your fruit or balls with the mouse and click to drop it! Who created Kawaii Fruits 3D? Kawaii Fruits 3D is created by Okashi Games. Play their other games on Poki: Karakuri , MicroWars , Rolling Jump , Nano War and Park Out ! How can I play Kawaii Fruits 3D for free? You can play Kawaii Fruits 3D for free on Poki. Can I play Kawaii Fruits 3D on mobile devices and desktop? Kawaii Fruits 3D can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
